name: Quick Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, set over simmering water, melt the chocolate.
2. Stir in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract and walnuts.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased, waxed paper or metal foil-lined 8x8 inch pan.
5. Bake at 375°F for about 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Turn out of the pan onto a cake rack and peel off any paper.
7. Cool completely before cutting into squares.
